case_title: ROBERT LEROY OLDER VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY OLDER, ROBERT LEROY AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLDER, ROBERT LEROY AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLDER, ROBERT LEROY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. PLAINTIFF RELEASED HIS CLAIMS AGAINST THE THC IN THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION CUD-17-659740. IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT PLAINTIFF WAS A PARTY IN THE SETTLED BEDBUG CASE. CGC-15-545733. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-09-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLDER, ROBERT LEROY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY COLLEEN CARRIGAN, DIRECTOR OF PROGRAMS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
